Stop.command: bash -c 'echo "\n[STOP] $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S) Agent stopped." && echo "  Reports: .harness/reports/" && echo "  Progress: .harness/progress.tsv" && if [ -d .harness/reports ]; then echo "  Latest report:" && ls -t .harness/reports/ | head -1; fi'

PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'AGENT=${CLAUDE_AGENT:-unknown}; if echo "$AGENT" | grep -iqE "qa|evaluator|monitor|reviewer"; then echo "BLOCK: QA/Evaluator agents cannot use Edit" >&2; exit 1; fi'
